form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, surrendered the lead and finished 7th (Fr3) over 2260m after showing early pace at this track beaten 21 m by Johnnys Blue (2:47.10) in NR up to 45 on March 11 at $81. Before that was well back in the run when 4th (Fr4) over 1730m at this track beaten 13 m by Ratatattat (2:07.00) in NR up to 45 on February 25 at $41. Will not find this easy.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Yielded ground from the 400m to finish in 10th and last position beaten 45.4m.
Broke gait free of interference leaving the 1400m.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth behind Riviere at this track over 1730m in a NR up to 52 on February 11 at $8.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing third behind Fliptop Bottleshop at this track over 1730m in a NR up to 53 on March 27 at $15. Sure to play a big role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait during the score-up and out of position at the start.
Inconvenienced passing the 1100m when In Lexys Wordsbroke gait.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr3) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 4th-5.65 beaten 6 m by She The Devil (2:02.60) in NR up to 57 on April 1 at $15. At the run before was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr8) over 2260m at this track beaten 70 m by Time To Torque (2:47.10) in NR up to 58 on March 27 at $26. Capable of a strong showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced during the middle stages before tiring to be beaten 70m.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr6) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 8th-18.59 beaten 10 m by Studleigh Melise (2:03.70) in NR up to 58 on April 8 at $12. At his previous start good run when 2nd (Sr2) over 2260m at this track, at the bell was 5th-9 beaten 3.5 m by In Lexys Words (2:45.70) in NR up to 52 on April 1 at $4.40. Going okay so keep him safe.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung inwards passing the 200m and raced roughly when corrected.
Held up for clear racing room in the early stages of the home straight.
Inclined to race roughly between the 400m and the 200m.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he won by a neck as favourite when quickly away, (Fr3) at this track (2:07.10) beating Arma Blaze in 2yo MAIDEN on December 17 at $2.15 at the bell was leading 4.1m on the pegs. Finds a nice race to launch the campaign.

form.formComment: Last start good run when 2nd (Fr5) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was leading 3.36 beaten 3.5 m by The Rogue I Am (2:03.60) in NR up to 55 M on April 8 at $4.60. Two runs back won by a neck as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:04.50) beating Rocket Me in NR up to 47 on April 1 at $3 at the bell was 3rd-4.58. Has the ability to play a major role.

form.formComment: Five-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Parkes and this track. Last start won by a nose (Sr2) at Parkes (2:02.20) beating Roll To The Top in NR up to 52 on April 4 at $12. Hard to fault on recent form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened approaching the 1400m when Petes Big Jim shifted in.

Hung inwards under pressure in the home straight.
Gate speed and led the one wide line throughout.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr1) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 7th-10.13 beaten 8 m by Aurora Mighty Rob (2:03.00) in 3yo NR up to 58 on April 8 at $34. Two runs back posted a big 12 m win as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:05.80) beating Harveys Tooth in MAIDEN on April 1 at $1.35 at the bell was 4th-5.5. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten.
